# Semantic Segmentation Model
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F
import torchvision.models as models

class SemanticSegmentationModel(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_classes=150, backbone_name='resnet50'):
        super().__init__()
        # Load pretrained ResNet50
        self.backbone = models.resnet50(weights='IMAGENET1K_V2')
        
        # Remove the final classification layer
        self.backbone.fc = nn.Identity()
        
        # Get feature channels from different layers
        self.layer0 = nn.Sequential(self.backbone.conv1, self.backbone.bn1, self.backbone.relu, self.backbone.maxpool)
        self.layer1 = self.backbone.layer1
        self.layer2 = self.backbone.layer2
        self.layer3 = self.backbone.layer3
        self.layer4 = self.backbone.layer4
        
        # Decoder layers - Fixed channel dimensions
        self.decoder4 = self._make_decoder_block(2048, 512)  # Layer4 output: 2048 channels
        self.decoder3 = self._make_decoder_block(1024 + 512, 256)  # Layer3 output: 1024 + upsampled: 512
        self.decoder2 = self._make_decoder_block(512 + 256, 128)  # Layer2 output: 512 + upsampled: 256
        self.decoder1 = self._make_decoder_block(256 + 128, 64)  # Layer1 output: 256 + upsampled: 128
        
        # Final prediction layer
        self.final_conv = nn.Conv2d(64, num_classes, kernel_size=1)
        
    def _make_decoder_block(self, in_channels, out_channels):
        return nn.Sequential(
            nn.Conv2d(in_channels, out_channels, kernel_size=3, padding=1),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(out_channels),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
            nn.Conv2d(out_channels, out_channels, kernel_size=3, padding=1),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(out_channels),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True)
        )
    
    def forward(self, x):
        # Encoder path
        x0 = self.layer0(x)  # [batch, 64, H/4, W/4]
        x1 = self.layer1(x0)  # [batch, 256, H/4, W/4]
        x2 = self.layer2(x1)  # [batch, 512, H/8, W/8]
        x3 = self.layer3(x2)  # [batch, 1024, H/16, W/16]
        x4 = self.layer4(x3)  # [batch, 2048, H/32, W/32]
        
        # Decoder path
        d4 = F.interpolate(x4, scale_factor=2, mode='bilinear', align_corners=False)  # [batch, 2048, H/16, W/16]
        d4 = torch.cat([d4, x3], dim=1)  # [batch, 2048+1024, H/16, W/16] = [batch, 3072, H/16, W/16]
        d4 = self.decoder4(d4)  # [batch, 512, H/16, W/16]
        
        d3 = F.interpolate(d4, scale_factor=2, mode='bilinear', align_corners=False)  # [batch, 512, H/8, W/8]
        d3 = torch.cat([d3, x2], dim=1)  # [batch, 512+512, H/8, W/8] = [batch, 1024, H/8, W/8]
        d3 = self.decoder3(d3)  # [batch, 256, H/8, W/8]
        
        d2 = F.interpolate(d3, scale_factor=2, mode='bilinear', align_corners=False)  # [batch, 256, H/4, W/4]
        d2 = torch.cat([d2, x1], dim=1)  # [batch, 256+256, H/4, W/4] = [batch, 512, H/4, W/4]
        d2 = self.decoder2(d2)  # [batch, 128, H/4, W/4]
        
        d1 = F.interpolate(d2, scale_factor=2, mode='bilinear', align_corners=False)  # [batch, 128, H/2, W/2]
        d1 = torch.cat([d1, x0], dim=1)  # [batch, 128+64, H/2, W/2] = [batch, 192, H/2, W/2]
        d1 = self.decoder1(d1)  # [batch, 64, H/2, W/2]
        
        d1 = F.interpolate(d1, scale_factor=2, mode='bilinear', align_corners=False)  # [batch, 64, H, W]
        
        out = self.final_conv(d1)  # [batch, num_classes, H, W]
        return out
